all_groups: ระยะเวลาการทำงาน
อนุมัติวงเงิน

prompt_rules: Dimension contract: JOIN emp_length_dim and GROUP BY emp_length_dim.emp_length.
Metric contract: SELECT/aggregate loans_fact.funded_amnt as a funding proxy; loan_amnt alone is insufficient.
Population contract: do not JOIN or filter loan_status/loan_status_dim; Current/Fully Paid are post-origination outcomes, not approval decisions.
Answer contract: state that no Approved/Rejected field exists and do not claim approval rate or causal effect.

observation_claims.description: The action groups the employment-length dimension.
observation_claims.hint: JOIN emp_length_dim and GROUP BY emp_length.

observation_claims.description: The action measures the configured funding proxy.
Post-origination status is not used as an approval population.

final_rules.pattern: loan_status[^.\n]{0,100}(?:อนุมัติ|approved|approval)|(?:อนุมัติ|approved|approval)[^.\n]{0,100}loan_status
final_rules.message: Do not interpret loan_status post-origination outcomes as an approval decision.

final_rules.pattern: วงเงิน(?:กู้)?ที่อนุมัติ\s*\(\s*loan_amnt\s*\)
final_rules.message: Do not relabel loan_amnt as approved amount.

final_rules.pattern: อัตราการอนุมัติ|approval rate
final_rules.message: Approval rate is unsupported without an approval-decision field.
Do not state a currency without currency metadata.

final_rules.pattern: (?:ส่วนใหญ่[^.\n]{0,80}(?:เต็มจำนวน|อนุมัติเต็ม)|most[^.\n]{0,80}(?:fully funded|full amount))
final_rules.message: A majority claim requires a row-level proportion with numerator and denominator.

final_rules.pattern: (?:ไม่มีข้อมูล|ไม่มี\s*(?:field|ฟิลด์))[^.\n]{0,120}(?:annual_inc|\bdti\b|home_ownership)
final_rules.message: MCP schema contains the stated control field; do not claim it is absent.
